title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion hosts a Reactive Extrusion workshop at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC, May 13-14, 2026.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation in polymer extrusion, benefiting local manufacturing and research.

title: Suspect Arrested in Charlotte Grocery Store Stabbing
summary: A woman with a criminal history has been arrested two weeks after stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Highlights concerns about public safety and repeat offenders in the Charlotte area.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about the effectiveness of the justice system and public safety measures.

title: Braylon Clark Details Visit with Tennessee Football
summary: 2028 Charlotte Country Day wide receiver Braylon Clark visits Knoxville, Tennessee for a football program visit.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local athletic talent and the recruitment process for young athletes.

title: Choosing the Best Deck Builder in Charlotte
summary: Tips on selecting a deck builder in Charlotte to enhance your home's outdoor living space and property value.
charlotte_impact: Provides valuable advice for homeowners looking to improve their properties.

title: Students Design Brand for Brown Museum
summary: Students design a brand for the Charlotte Hawkins Brown Museum in Guilford County, NC. Canary Cottage is 100 years old.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the preservation of local history and student involvement in community projects.

title: FG Nexus CEO to Speak at FII Priority Miami 2026
summary: FG Nexus CEO Maja Vujinovic will co-chair the digital assets conclave and speak on a stablecoins panel at FII Priority Miami 2026.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's involvement in the digital assets and finance industry.

title: Carolina Panthers Name Atrium Health Training Facility
summary: The Carolina Panthers partner with Atrium Health to name their training facility, expected to open before the 2027 training camp.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the partnership between sports and healthcare in the Charlotte region.

title: Duke Energy Requests Another Rate Hike
summary: Duke Energy requests a rate hike to recover approximately $800 million in fuel and power costs from the extreme cold earlier this year.
charlotte_impact: Impacts consumers and raises concerns about energy affordability in the region.

title: NC Cannabis Council Pushes Legalization
summary: The NC cannabis council advocates for a regulated marijuana market, potentially impacting existing businesses.
charlotte_impact: Signals a potential shift in cannabis policy and its economic consequences.

title: One Dead, Two Hospitalized After Charlotte Shooting
summary: A shooting on Forest Point Boulevard in southwest Charlotte resulted in one death and two hospitalizations.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about gun violence and public safety in the city.

title: Gang Member Arrested After Wife Shot, Killing Unborn Child
summary: An alleged Venezuelan gang member was arrested after his pregnant wife accidentally shot herself, killing their unborn child.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the tragic consequences of gun violence and potential gang activity.

title: Gaston County Ambulance Involved in Crash
summary: An ambulance in Gaston County was involved in a crash with several injuries. The public is asked to avoid East Long Avenue.
charlotte_impact: Disrupts emergency services and raises concerns about road safety.

title: Charlotte Water Moves to Voluntary Water Restrictions
summary: Charlotte Water urges customers to reduce non-essential water use due to drought conditions.
charlotte_impact: Indicates a growing water shortage and the need for conservation efforts.

title: Severe Drought Grows to Almost 100% of the Carolinas
summary: The drought is the worst for North Carolina since 2008 and for South Carolina since 2002.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the severity of the drought and its potential impact on agriculture and water resources.
